---
name: Adapter request
about: Ask for support for a new project type / stack (a new "adapter")
title: "adapter: "
labels: adapter-request
---

<!--
An "adapter" is the declarative block (root markers, layers, file extensions,
conventions) that lets sf's project tools understand a given codebase/stack.
This template exists mostly as a demand signal — even a rough answer to the
first three questions is useful; fill in what you can.
-->

**Stack / framework**
What language, framework, or convention set needs support? (e.g. "Laravel",
"Django", "a monorepo with Nx")

**Project(s) you'd use this on**
Public repo link if you can share one, or a short description of the layout
(how modules/layers are organized, what marks the project root).

**What's missing today**
What can't you do with sf's existing tools (`code`, `grep`, `changed`, ...) on
this stack? A concrete example beats a general description.

**Would you be up for contributing it?**
Yes / no / maybe with some pointers — no wrong answer, just helps us plan.
